description: A screenshot of a social media post. The header shows an account display name and the handle realDonaldTrump with a verification mark and a profile picture styled as a stars-and-stripes portrait. The attached photograph, taken at floor level inside a marble-walled lobby, shows a shirtless man lying face down on patterned carpet with his arms behind his back while several officers in dark tactical clothing stand nearby; a piece of foil emergency blanket lies on the floor.
